features.name: continuous_assign_drives_unconnected_rhs
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment where the right-hand side is an unconnected wire that is never driven elsewhere. This triggers a direction-reversal bug where the left-hand side incorrectly drives the right-hand side instead of the expected behavior where the right-hand side drives the left-hand side.

features.name: output_wire_rhs_only
features.description: Code should include an output wire port that appears only on the right-hand side of a continuous assignment and is never driven anywhere else. Such wires should float but can trigger incorrect drive direction behavior in synthesis tools.

features.name: missing_doubly_driven_diagnostic
features.description: Code should include a signal that is driven by multiple sources (e.g., a DFF output and a continuous assignment) without the tool issuing a warning or error. This missing diagnostic allows direction-reversal bugs to go unnoticed.
features.snippet: assign second_delay = first_delay; // second_delay also driven by dff2
